sn22.65:1.1:
1
Sāvatthinidānaṁ. Atha kho aññataro bhikkhu … pe … ekamantaṁ nisinno kho so bhikkhu bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
"sādhu me, bhante, bhagavā saṅkhittena … pe … pahitatto vihareyyan"ti.
sn22.65:1.2: "Abhinandamāno kho, bhikkhu, baddho mārassa; anabhinandamāno mutto pāpimato"ti.
sn22.65:1.4:
2
"Yathā kathaṁ pana tvaṁ, bhikkhu, mayā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāsī"ti?
sn22.65:1.5:
"Rūpaṁ kho, bhante, abhinandamāno baddho mārassa; anabhinandamāno mutto pāpimato. vedanāṁ … saññaṁ … saṅkhāre … viññāṇaṁ abhinandamāno baddho mārassa; anabhinandamāno mutto pāpimato.
Imassa khvāhaṁ, bhante, bhagavatā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa evaṁ vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāmī"ti.
sn22.65:1.6:
3
"Sādhu sādhu, bhikkhu. Sādhu kho tvaṁ, bhikkhu, mayā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāsi. Rūpaṁ kho, bhikkhu, abhinandamāno baddho mārassa; anabhinandamāno mutto pāpimato. vedanāṁ … saññaṁ … saṅkhāre … viññāṇaṁ abhinandamāno baddho mārassa; anabhinandamāno mutto pāpimato. Imassa kho, bhikkhu, mayā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa evaṁ vitthārena attho daṭṭhabbo"ti … pe …
sn22.65:1.7:
… aññataro ca pana so bhikkhu arahataṁ ahosīti.
Tatiyaṁ.
